scripts.bootstrap: sh -c 'cd ../.. && PORT=4002 MIX_ENV=test E2E=1 mix ecto.create --quiet && PORT=4002 MIX_ENV=test E2E=1 mix ecto.migrate --quiet && PORT=4002 MIX_ENV=test E2E=1 mix run test/support/e2e/bootstrap.exs'
scripts.test:journeys: npm run bootstrap && playwright test specs/knowledge_ops_lead.spec.js
